title: Lesson 195: (Grammar) - won't (hasn't, isn't, doesn't, etc.); won't you

intro_cards.title: Invitation: ませんか
intro_cards.body:
ませんか invites someone to do something — 'Won't you ~?' / 'Would you like to ~?'

Pattern: [verb stem] + ませんか

• 一緒に食べませんか？(Would you like to eat together?)
• 映画を見ませんか？(Would you like to see a movie?)
• ちょっと休みませんか。(How about taking a short break?)

ませんか vs ましょうか:
• ませんか = gentle invitation (asking if they'd like to)
• ましょうか = offering / proposing a joint action

Casual equivalent: ない？ / どう？
